ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 Deducted from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

This is a notification that a transaction of ₹5,000 has been debited from your account on 15 Aug 2024 at 10:15 AM. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact customer support immediately.

Thank you,
Your Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Pay Your FedEx Delivery Fee NOW!
spam.body:
Hello,

It seems that your package delivered by FedEx was not received on the scheduled date and a missed delivery fee of ₹2,000 has been added to your account. To avoid additional charges, please pay the fee within 48 hours.

Click <URL> to pay now.

Thank you,
FedEx Delivery Team
